case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MALLORY B COYAN et al

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUN-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COYAN, MALLORY B
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT COYAN, MALLORY B
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COYAN, MALLORY B DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2014

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COYAN, MALLORY B $1,011.68 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,247.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 74939563) FILED BY ATTORNEY PIERCE, EMILY
